==== noCrashOnMixin2.tlua (34 errors) ====
    // https://github.com/microsoft/TypeScript/issues/62921
    
    class Abstract {
    ~~~~~
!!! error TLUA1434: Unexpected keyword or identifier.
    ~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'class'.
          ~~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA1435: Unknown keyword or identifier. Did you mean 'abstract'?
          ~~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'Abstract'.
        protected constructor() {
        ~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA1128: Declaration or statement expected.
                  ~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'constructor'.
                                ~
!!! error TLUA1005: ';' expected.
        }
    }
    
    class Concrete extends Abstract {
    ~~~~~
!!! error TLUA1434: Unexpected keyword or identifier.
    ~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'class'.
          ~~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA1434: Unexpected keyword or identifier.
          ~~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'Concrete'.
                   ~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA1128: Declaration or statement expected.
                           ~~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA1435: Unknown keyword or identifier. Did you mean 'abstract'?
                           ~~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'Abstract'.
    }
    
    type Constructor<T = {}> = new (...args?: any[]) => T;
                                    ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2370: A rest parameter must be of an array type.
                                       ~~~~
!!! error TLUA100034: A vararg parameter cannot have a name.
    
    function Mixin<TBase extends Constructor>(Base: TBase) {
        return class extends Base {
               ~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'class'.
                     ~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA1005: ';' expected.
                             ~~~~
!!! error TLUA1434: Unexpected keyword or identifier.
        };
    }
    
    class Empty {
    ~~~~~
!!! error TLUA1434: Unexpected keyword or identifier.
    ~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'class'.
          ~~~~~
!!! error TLUA1434: Unexpected keyword or identifier.
          ~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'Empty'.
    }
    
    class CrashTrigger extends Mixin(Empty) {
    ~~~~~
!!! error TLUA1434: Unexpected keyword or identifier.
    ~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'class'.
          ~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA1434: Unexpected keyword or identifier.
          ~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'CrashTrigger'.
                       ~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA1128: Declaration or statement expected.
                                     ~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'Empty'.
                                            ~
!!! error TLUA1005: ';' expected.
        public trigger() {
        ~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA1128: Declaration or statement expected.
               ~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'trigger'.
                         ~
!!! error TLUA1005: ';' expected.
            new Concrete();
                ~~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'Concrete'.
        }
    }
